generated_oml:
instance PhysicalObjectStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Data transmitted from physical object states via one-way digital shadow data flow"
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model using SysML Internal Block Diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, ACMEEnabler, AADLEnabler, MontiArcEnabler
]

instance StateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using MontiArc Automaton"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance PhysicalObjectStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data derived from physical object states via one-way digital shadow data flow"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalObjectStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, ACMEEnabler, AADLEnabler, MontiArcEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)"
]

]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for defining components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
]

    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for defining components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation and detailed behavior modeling"
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

    base:desc "Java programming language for detailed behavior modeling"
]

instance MBSEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodology for system modeling across abstraction levels"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs industry-standard modeling languages and architecture description languages including SysML [17], AADL [24], ACME [23], and MontiArc [25, 26] for component-interface-based system modeling across multiple abstraction levels such as requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers."
